title: muxcover refuses to create MUX4 for 3:1 mux

features.name: variable_width_part_select_in_unpacked_array
features.description: Code should include a part-select with dynamically computed index and parameter-driven width using the i[k*W+:W] syntax on an unpacked array

features.name: nested_if_else_mux_with_binary_selector
features.description: Code should include a nested if-else chain implementing a multiplexer where each branch compares a binary selector bit against 1'b0

features.name: clog2_selector_sizing
features.description: Code should include a $clog2(N) function call used to compute a selector's bit width based on a parameter N

features.name: concat_replication_default_value
features.description: Code should include a concatenation replication pattern for generating a default value with width based on parameter: {{W{1'bx}}}
